이사야 8:1.content: Yahweh said to me, “Take a large tablet, and write on it with a man’s pen, ‘For Maher Shalal Hash Baz’;

이사야 8:2.content: and I will take for myself faithful witnesses to testify: Uriah the priest, and Zechariah the son of Jeberechiah.”

이사야 8:3.content: I went to the prophetess, and she conceived, and bore a son. Then Yahweh said to me, “Call his name ‘Maher Shalal Hash Baz.’

이사야 8:4.content: For before the child knows how to say, ‘My father,’ and, ‘My mother,’ the riches of Damascus and the plunder of Samaria will be carried away by the king of Assyria.”

이사야 8:5.content: Yahweh spoke to me yet again, saying,

이사야 8:6.content: “Because this people has refused the waters of Shiloah that go softly, and rejoice in Rezin and Remaliah’s son;

이사야 8:7.content: now therefore, behold, the Lord brings upon them the mighty flood waters of the River: the king of Assyria and all his glory. It will come up over all its channels, and go over all its banks.

이사야 8:8.content: It will sweep onward into Judah. It will overflow and pass through. It will reach even to the neck. The stretching out of its wings will fill the width of your land, Immanuel.

이사야 8:9.content: Make an uproar, you peoples, and be broken in pieces! Listen, all you from far countries: dress for battle, and be shattered! Dress for battle, and be shattered!

이사야 8:10.content: Take counsel together, and it will be brought to nothing; speak the word, and it will not stand, for God is with us.”

이사야 8:11.content: For Yahweh spoke this to me with a strong hand, and instructed me not to walk in the way of this people, saying,

이사야 8:12.content: “Don’t say, ‘A conspiracy!’ concerning all about which this people say, ‘A conspiracy!’ neither fear their threats, nor be terrorized.

이사야 8:13.content: Yahweh of Armies is who you must respect as holy. He is the one you must fear. He is the one you must dread.

이사야 8:14.content: He will be a sanctuary, but for both houses of Israel, he will be a stumbling stone and a rock that makes them fall. For the people of Jerusalem, he will be a trap and a snare.

이사야 8:15.content: Many will stumble over it, fall, be broken, be snared, and be captured.”

이사야 8:16.content: Wrap up the covenant. Seal the law among my disciples.

이사야 8:17.content: I will wait for Yahweh, who hides his face from the house of Jacob, and I will look for him.

이사야 8:18.content: Behold, I and the children whom Yahweh has given me are for signs and for wonders in Israel from Yahweh of Armies, who dwells in Mount Zion.

이사야 8:19.content: When they tell you, “Consult with those who have familiar spirits and with the wizards, who chirp and who mutter,” shouldn’t a people consult with their God? Should they consult the dead on behalf of the living?

이사야 8:20.content: Turn to the law and to the covenant! If they don’t speak according to this word, surely there is no morning for them.

이사야 8:21.content: They will pass through it, very distressed and hungry. It will happen that when they are hungry, they will worry, and curse by their king and by their God. They will turn their faces upward,

이사야 8:22.content: and look to the earth, and see distress, darkness, and the gloom of anguish. They will be driven into thick darkness.
